text.text:
*AI WEEKLY SIGNALS — 4–10 MAY 2026*

*Adoption:*
— :tada: AI-assisted hosted events: *25.0%* (WoW +1.8pp). 12-week climb: 18.1% → 25.0%. All-time high.
— Prompts per user (Slides Agent): *3.4* (WoW +0.3). 4w trend: trending up.

*Satisfaction:*
— :warning: Slides Agent CSAT: 74.5% (WoW -4.0pp), n=55. -6.0pp vs 4w avg of 80.6%.
— Slides Agent top comment: _"not useful"_ — said 4 times this week (of 7 comments).
— Presentation Review CSAT: 50.0% (n=4 — too sparse to read).

*Reliability:*
— Slides Agent failure-refreshes: flat WoW, trending down over 4w — good direction.
— Upload failure rate: down 0.8pp WoW, holding steady over 4w — good direction.

*Notable:*
— Twelve-week adoption climb finally crossed 25%, and it did so on a thinner audience — total hosted sessions dipped this week (likely Labour Day / Golden Week drag), yet the AI-assist rate still set a record. The presenters who did show up leant on AI more.
— CSAT is the wobble to watch: -6.0pp vs the 4w average, dislikes up to 14, and "not useful" led free-text feedback (4 of 7). Small absolute volumes, but a consistent complaint worth a closer look.
— Reliability is in good shape: refreshes nearly halved over 4 weeks (avg 18.2 → 11 this week), upload failures essentially flat at 3.6%.
